entries.prompt_text: Set the data label font in {chart_title} to {font_size} {font_name}
Move the data labels outside the bars in {chart_title} so they are not clipped
Change the data label color in {chart_title} to {text_color} so it contrasts with the bar fill
Increase the data label font size in {chart_title} to {font_size}
Bold the data labels in {chart_title}
Add a {text_color} background fill behind the data labels in {chart_title} so they pop
Remove the overlapping data labels in {chart_title} and keep only the end-of-bar labels
Rotate the data labels in {chart_title} to {rotation_angle} degrees so they do not overlap
Show the data labels in {chart_title} with {decimal_places} decimal places
Add {currency_symbol} to every data label in {chart_title}
Add percent signs to the data labels in {chart_title}
Move the data labels to the center of each slice in {chart_title}
Remove data labels from the small slices in {chart_title} and keep them only on slices over {threshold_percent}
Use leader lines on the data labels for the small slices in {chart_title}
Match the data label style in {chart_title} to {reference_chart}
Use {pattern_type} fill patterns in addition to color on the bars in {chart_title}
Change the {series_name} series in {chart_title} to a {pattern_type} pattern
Use grayscale-distinguishable fills for all series in {chart_title}
Change the two series in {chart_title} to {fill_color_1} and {fill_color_2} with patterns
Add distinct marker shapes for each series in {chart_title}
Add a dot pattern to the {slice_name} slice in {chart_title}
Use a stripe pattern on the {series_name} bars in {chart_title}
Change the stacked bar fills in {chart_title} to alternating stripe and solid patterns
Use crosshatch fill on the {series_name} series in {chart_title}
Increase the line thickness of the {series_name} series in {chart_title} to {line_weight} for visibility
Use dashed lines for the {series_name} series and solid lines for {second_series_name} in {chart_title}
Add direct labels to each line in {chart_title} so the legend is not the only way to distinguish series
Make sure no two adjacent series in {chart_title} use the same fill brightness
Change the {series_name} marker shape in {chart_title} to {marker_shape}
Add a {pattern_type} overlay to the forecast section in {chart_title}
Change the {series_name} series color in {chart_title} to {fill_color}
Change the two series in {chart_title} to {fill_color_1} and {fill_color_2}
Match the chart colors in {chart_title} to the colors used in {reference_element}
Use a consistent color palette across {chart_title} and {reference_chart}
Change the bar fill in {chart_title} from {old_color} to {fill_color}
Increase the contrast between the {series_name} and {second_series_name} colors in {chart_title}
Set every series in {chart_title} to a shade of {base_color} from light to dark
Change the highlight color on the {category_name} bar in {chart_title} to {fill_color}
Use {fill_color} for positive values and {negative_color} for negative values in {chart_title}
Remove the gradient fill on the bars in {chart_title} and use a flat {fill_color}
Change the {slice_name} slice color in {chart_title} to {fill_color}
Match the line color for {series_name} in {chart_title} to the brand color {fill_color}
Use the same color for {series_name} across all charts
Desaturate the background series in {chart_title} so the focus series stands out
Change the target line color in {chart_title} to {line_color}
Increase the gap width between bars in {chart_title} to {gap_percent}
Reduce the gap width between bars in {chart_title} to {gap_percent}
Set the bar width in {chart_title} so bars do not overlap
Match the bar width and spacing in {chart_title} to {reference_chart}
Set the overlap between grouped bars in {chart_title} to {overlap_percent}
Widen the bars in {chart_title} so they are easier to see
Narrow the bars in {chart_title} so the data labels fit next to them
Remove the gap between stacked segments in {chart_title}
Add a {gap_percent} gap between bar groups in {chart_title}
Make all bars in {chart_title} the same width
Set the gap width in {chart_title} to {gap_percent} so the chart does not look cramped
Reduce the bar overlap in {chart_title} to {overlap_percent} so individual bars are visible
Even out the bar spacing in {chart_title} so all gaps are the same width
Increase the pie chart explosion distance on the {slice_name} slice in {chart_title} to {explosion_value}
Set the doughnut hole size in {chart_title} to {hole_percent}
Set the legend font in {chart_title} to {font_size} {font_name}

Remove the fill behind the legend box in {chart_title}

Reduce the spacing between the swatch and the label text in {chart_title}
